controls.title: Legal and Regulatory Requirements
controls.description: Legal and regulatory requirements involving AI are understood, managed, and documented
controls.implementationGuidance: Identify applicable laws, regulations, and policies; establish processes to track changes; document compliance measures; conduct regular reviews of legal landscape

controls.title: Roles and Responsibilities
controls.description: Roles and responsibilities and lines of communication related to mapping, measuring, and managing AI risks are documented and are clear to all personnel
controls.implementationGuidance: Define AI governance roles; establish accountability structures; document decision-making authority; create communication channels; ensure role clarity across organization
aiRiskDomains: AI System Safety, Failures, and Limitations

controls.title: Organizational AI Risk Tolerance
controls.description: Organizational risk tolerances are determined and documented
controls.implementationGuidance: Define acceptable risk levels for AI systems; establish risk appetite statements; align with organizational values; document risk thresholds; communicate to stakeholders
aiRiskDomains: AI System Safety, Failures, and Limitations

controls.title: Risk Management Process Integration
controls.description: Organizational risk management process and its outcomes are integrated into AI system life cycle
controls.implementationGuidance: Embed risk management in design, development, deployment phases; establish checkpoints; integrate with existing processes; ensure continuous risk monitoring
aiRiskDomains: AI System Safety, Failures, and Limitations

controls.title: Risk Management Resources
controls.description: Organizational risk management processes and responsibilities are in place for AI systems and their risks
controls.implementationGuidance: Allocate budget and personnel for AI risk management; establish dedicated teams; provide training; ensure adequate resources for risk activities
aiRiskDomains: AI System Safety, Failures, and Limitations

controls.title: Inventory of AI Systems
controls.description: An inventory of AI systems and their purposes, capabilities, and limitations is maintained
controls.implementationGuidance: Create comprehensive AI system registry; document use cases and capabilities; track system versions; maintain up-to-date records; include risk classifications
aiRiskDomains: AI System Safety, Failures, and Limitations

controls.title: Third-Party AI Risk Management
controls.description: Processes and procedures are in place for oversight of third-party AI systems
controls.implementationGuidance: Establish vendor assessment criteria; conduct third-party AI audits; require contractual risk commitments; monitor external AI services; ensure supply chain transparency

controls.title: Diversity and Inclusion
controls.description: Diverse perspectives, including those from representative end users, inform AI system design, development, and deployment
controls.implementationGuidance: Build diverse development teams; incorporate varied stakeholder input; conduct inclusive design reviews; ensure representation in testing; gather diverse feedback

controls.title: Accessibility Requirements
controls.description: Accessibility requirements are incorporated into AI system design and development
controls.implementationGuidance: Implement accessibility standards; test with assistive technologies; ensure interface usability; provide alternative interaction modes; follow WCAG guidelines for AI interfaces

controls.title: Equity Considerations
controls.description: Equity considerations are incorporated into AI system design and development processes
controls.implementationGuidance: Conduct equity impact assessments; identify vulnerable populations; address systemic biases; ensure fair resource allocation; monitor for disparate impacts

controls.title: Organizational AI Culture
controls.description: Organizational culture is established to value and promote responsible AI practices
controls.implementationGuidance: Foster ethical AI mindset; reward responsible practices; encourage risk reporting; provide AI ethics training; establish clear values and principles
aiRiskDomains: AI System Safety, Failures, and Limitations

controls.title: AI Workforce Competency
controls.description: Personnel involved in AI systems possess appropriate AI and domain expertise
controls.implementationGuidance: Assess competency requirements; provide technical training; ensure domain knowledge; conduct skill gap analysis; support continuous learning
aiRiskDomains: AI System Safety, Failures, and Limitations

controls.title: AI System Context Documentation
controls.description: Context of use is documented for AI systems, including intended purposes and uses
controls.implementationGuidance: Document use case scenarios; define intended users; specify operational environment; clarify system boundaries; identify assumptions
aiRiskDomains: AI System Safety, Failures, and Limitations

controls.title: Known Limitations Documentation
controls.description: Known limitations of AI systems, including their potential for misuse, are documented
controls.implementationGuidance: Identify system constraints; document failure modes; specify out-of-scope uses; communicate limitations to users; establish boundaries
aiRiskDomains: AI System Safety, Failures, and Limitations

controls.title: System Requirements and Design
controls.description: System requirements are elicited and design specifications are defined
controls.implementationGuidance: Gather functional requirements; define performance criteria; establish quality attributes; document design specifications; ensure traceability
aiRiskDomains: AI System Safety, Failures, and Limitations

controls.title: Stakeholder Impact Assessment
controls.description: Potential impacts of AI systems on individuals, communities, and society are identified
controls.implementationGuidance: Conduct stakeholder analysis; assess social impacts; evaluate environmental effects; consider economic consequences; document findings

controls.title: Benefits and Costs Analysis
controls.description: Benefits and costs of AI systems are understood by mapped to risks
controls.implementationGuidance: Quantify expected benefits; calculate implementation costs; assess risk-benefit tradeoffs; document value proposition; consider total cost of ownership

controls.title: AI Technology Characteristics
controls.description: AI technologies and their characteristics are identified and documented
controls.implementationGuidance: Specify AI techniques used; document model architectures; identify algorithms; describe learning approaches; catalog technical components
aiRiskDomains: AI System Safety, Failures, and Limitations

controls.title: Model Training Data
controls.description: Information about AI system training data is documented
controls.implementationGuidance: Document data sources; describe collection methods; specify data characteristics; track data lineage; maintain data cards

controls.title: System Dependencies
controls.description: Dependencies and relationships between AI system components are documented
controls.implementationGuidance: Map system architecture; identify integration points; document APIs; track version dependencies; maintain component registry
aiRiskDomains: AI System Safety, Failures, and Limitations

controls.title: Risk Identification
controls.description: Potential risks and impacts of AI systems are identified across multiple categories
controls.implementationGuidance: Conduct risk brainstorming; review risk taxonomies; analyze failure scenarios; consider edge cases; document identified risks
aiRiskDomains: AI System Safety, Failures, and Limitations

controls.title: Risk Classification
controls.description: Risks are analyzed and classified according to impact and likelihood
controls.implementationGuidance: Assess risk severity; estimate probability; categorize by type; prioritize risks; create risk matrix
aiRiskDomains: AI System Safety, Failures, and Limitations

controls.title: Harmful Bias Assessment
controls.description: Potential for harmful bias and discrimination is assessed
controls.implementationGuidance: Conduct bias testing; analyze protected attributes; evaluate fairness metrics; assess disparate impact; document findings

controls.title: Privacy and Security Risk Assessment
controls.description: Privacy and security risks of AI systems are assessed
controls.implementationGuidance: Conduct privacy impact assessment; identify sensitive data; assess security vulnerabilities; evaluate data protection measures; document risks

controls.title: Transparency and Explainability Needs
controls.description: Transparency and explainability requirements are identified based on AI system risks
controls.implementationGuidance: Define explainability requirements; specify transparency needs; identify target audiences; establish documentation standards; determine disclosure levels

controls.title: Performance Metrics
controls.description: Appropriate methods and metrics are identified and applied to measure AI system performance
controls.implementationGuidance: Define success metrics; establish baselines; implement measurement systems; track performance over time; document methodology
aiRiskDomains: AI System Safety, Failures, and Limitations

controls.title: Bias and Fairness Testing
controls.description: AI systems are tested for bias and fairness using appropriate metrics
controls.implementationGuidance: Select fairness metrics; conduct bias testing; test across demographics; validate with diverse data; report findings

controls.title: Robustness Testing
controls.description: AI systems are tested for robustness against adversarial attacks and edge cases
controls.implementationGuidance: Conduct adversarial testing; test edge cases; assess resilience; evaluate failure modes; document vulnerabilities
aiRiskDomains: AI System Safety, Failures, and Limitations

controls.title: Data Quality Assessment
controls.description: Data quality is assessed and monitored throughout the AI system lifecycle
controls.implementationGuidance: Define data quality criteria; implement validation checks; monitor data drift; assess completeness; track quality metrics
aiRiskDomains: AI System Safety, Failures, and Limitations

controls.title: Data Representativeness
controls.description: Training and test data are assessed for representativeness and coverage
controls.implementationGuidance: Analyze data distribution; assess population coverage; identify underrepresented groups; validate against use cases; document gaps

controls.title: Ongoing Monitoring
controls.description: AI system performance is continuously monitored in operational environments
controls.implementationGuidance: Implement real-time monitoring; track performance metrics; detect anomalies; alert on degradation; maintain logs
aiRiskDomains: AI System Safety, Failures, and Limitations

controls.title: Transparency Documentation
controls.description: Transparency artifacts are created and maintained for AI systems
controls.implementationGuidance: Create model cards; document system behavior; provide explanation interfaces; maintain technical documentation; publish transparency reports

controls.title: Explainability Mechanisms
controls.description: Explainability methods are implemented appropriate to the AI system and use case
controls.implementationGuidance: Implement explanation methods; provide decision rationale; offer counterfactual examples; enable user queries; validate explanations

controls.title: User Communication
controls.description: Information about AI system capabilities, limitations, and appropriate use is communicated to users
controls.implementationGuidance: Create user documentation; provide system notifications; communicate limitations; offer usage guidance; establish feedback channels

controls.title: Security Controls Assessment
controls.description: Security controls for AI systems are assessed and validated
controls.implementationGuidance: Test security controls; conduct penetration testing; assess access controls; validate encryption; review security logs

controls.title: Privacy Controls Assessment
controls.description: Privacy controls and data protection measures are assessed
controls.implementationGuidance: Audit data handling; verify consent mechanisms; test anonymization; validate access controls; review data retention

controls.title: Incident Detection
controls.description: Mechanisms are in place to detect AI system failures and security incidents
controls.implementationGuidance: Implement anomaly detection; configure alerting; monitor system health; track security events; establish thresholds
aiRiskDomains: AI System Safety, Failures, and Limitations

controls.title: Risk Treatment Plan
controls.description: Risk treatment plans are documented and implemented for identified AI risks
controls.implementationGuidance: Develop mitigation strategies; assign risk owners; establish timelines; allocate resources; track implementation
aiRiskDomains: AI System Safety, Failures, and Limitations

controls.title: Risk Prioritization
controls.description: Risks are prioritized based on impact, likelihood, and organizational risk tolerance
controls.implementationGuidance: Apply risk scoring; consider business impact; assess technical feasibility; align with risk appetite; document priorities
aiRiskDomains: AI System Safety, Failures, and Limitations

controls.title: Control Implementation
controls.description: Risk controls and mitigations are implemented and validated
controls.implementationGuidance: Deploy controls; test effectiveness; validate implementation; document procedures; train personnel
aiRiskDomains: AI System Safety, Failures, and Limitations

controls.title: Residual Risk Assessment
controls.description: Residual risks are evaluated after control implementation
controls.implementationGuidance: Assess remaining risks; verify control effectiveness; document residual risk levels; obtain risk acceptance; communicate to stakeholders
aiRiskDomains: AI System Safety, Failures, and Limitations

controls.title: Incident Response Plan
controls.description: Incident response procedures are established for AI system failures and security events
controls.implementationGuidance: Create response playbooks; define escalation procedures; establish response teams; conduct drills; maintain contact lists
aiRiskDomains: AI System Safety, Failures, and Limitations

controls.title: Incident Investigation
controls.description: AI incidents are investigated to determine root causes and contributing factors
controls.implementationGuidance: Conduct root cause analysis; gather evidence; analyze system logs; document findings; identify lessons learned
aiRiskDomains: AI System Safety, Failures, and Limitations

controls.title: Corrective Actions
controls.description: Corrective actions are taken to address identified AI system issues
controls.implementationGuidance: Implement fixes; update procedures; retrain models; patch vulnerabilities; verify resolution
aiRiskDomains: AI System Safety, Failures, and Limitations

controls.title: Stakeholder Communication
controls.description: Affected stakeholders are informed about AI incidents and their resolution
controls.implementationGuidance: Develop communication plans; notify affected parties; provide status updates; document communications; manage public relations

controls.title: System Maintenance
controls.description: AI systems are maintained and updated to address identified issues and changing conditions
controls.implementationGuidance: Schedule regular updates; apply patches; retrain models; update documentation; maintain version control
aiRiskDomains: AI System Safety, Failures, and Limitations

controls.title: Performance Monitoring
controls.description: AI system performance is continuously monitored and degradation is addressed
controls.implementationGuidance: Track performance metrics; detect drift; analyze trends; trigger alerts; initiate retraining
aiRiskDomains: AI System Safety, Failures, and Limitations

controls.title: Decommissioning Procedures
controls.description: Procedures for AI system decommissioning are established and followed
controls.implementationGuidance: Plan decommissioning; archive system artifacts; secure or destroy data; notify users; transfer knowledge

controls.title: Data Disposition
controls.description: Data is properly disposed of or archived when AI systems are decommissioned
controls.implementationGuidance: Follow data retention policies; securely delete sensitive data; archive required records; document disposition; verify completion

controls.title: Lessons Learned
controls.description: Lessons learned from AI system operation are documented and shared
controls.implementationGuidance: Conduct retrospectives; document insights; share knowledge; update best practices; improve future systems
aiRiskDomains: AI System Safety, Failures, and Limitations
